action.reasoning:
Observation: DLinear-decomp gave val_mse=2.06, much worse than NLinear (1.57). So decomp doesn't help here. Best so far is ridge_last_tv at MSE=0.4632. Time ~50min, 9 iters left. 

Analysis: Let me try an ensemble of last-value-norm ridge + mean-norm ridge, and also try per-channel different lambdas (lambda tuned per channel). Also try: drop weight (weighted LS giving more weight to recent windows). Simplest leverage: do ridge regression but predict difference Y - last directly (already doing), and ensemble with naive last-value persistence.

Actually a known strong trick: subtract last value AND seasonal naive (24h period) and predict residual. Or just ensemble last and mean modes.

Decision: Try per-channel lambda tuning + ensemble of last-mode with seasonal-naive (repeat last 24h pattern).
